title: Crucial Reimagined
description: An adventurous expansion on vanilla Minecraft with Pam's Harvest Craft 2, Farmer's Delight, Dungeons and Taverns, The Undergardens and Biomes o' Plenty with many more quality of life mods to ensure a fun and performant playthrough!
body: An adventurous expansion on vanilla Minecraft with Pam's Harvest Craft 2, Farmer's Delight, Dungeons and Taverns, The Undergarden and Biomes o' Plenty with many quality of life mods like mousetweaks and better 3rd person to ensure a fun and performant playthrough! It employs mods such as Sodium and Iris to provide vibrant visuals while remaining at its peak performance. Several shaders are built-in for easier integration.
